info.title: EasyPost Shipping API
info.description: EasyPost provides a simple, unified shipping API for UPS, USPS, FedEx, DHL, and more. It enables comparing rates, purchasing postage, tracking packages, verifying addresses, and managing shipments at scale.

post.summary: Create and verify an address in one step

200.description: Purchased shipment with label and tracking code

get.summary: Convert label format for a shipment

post.summary: Purchase all shipments in a batch
Create a scan form for a batch

200.description: Purchased order with tracking and labels

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: CarrierAccount ID (begins with ca_) or reference

basicAuth.description: Use your EasyPost API key as the username with no password. All requests must use TLS v1.2.

PageSize.name: page_size
PageSize.description: Number of records per page (max 100, default 20)

BeforeId.name: before_id
BeforeId.description: Pagination cursor: only return records created before this ID

AfterId.name: after_id
AfterId.description: Pagination cursor: only return records created after this ID

StartDatetime.name: start_datetime
StartDatetime.description: Filter records created on or after this ISO 8601 datetime

EndDatetime.name: end_datetime
EndDatetime.description: Filter records created on or before this ISO 8601 datetime

verifications.description: Verification results for zip4 and delivery

carrier_accounts.description: List of CarrierAccount IDs to filter rates

tracking_codes.description: List of tracking codes to refund

status.description: Map of statuses to shipment counts

shipments.description: Array of shipment objects to include in the batch

address.description: Address object or ID for pickup location

shipment.description: Shipment object with ID (if no batch)

batch.description: Batch object with ID (if no shipment)

url.description: HTTPS endpoint URL for webhook notifications

fields.description: Credential metadata with visibility and label info

tags.name: Addresses
tags.description: Create, retrieve, and verify shipping addresses

tags.name: Insurance
tags.description: Insure shipments for loss or damage

tags.name: CustomsItems
tags.description: Declare customs items for international shipments

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: Group multiple shipments into a single order

tags.name: ScanForms
tags.description: Create SCAN forms for batch shipments

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Manage webhook endpoints for event notifications
